latestHandover: Session 1 complete. Phase 1 (NEXT-01/02/03, MB-01) and Phase 2 (MB-02, MB-03) implemented and pushed to audit/260311-testing-efficiency branches. Frontend CI split: new DB-free unit-tests job using npx vitest run --project unit (no Supabase) + integration-tests job (keeps Supabase). vitest.config.ts updated to use test.projects (Vitest v4 API) so --project filter resolves. match-backend: tests restructured into unit/ and integration/ subdirs, skip guard added to test_supabase_integration.py, first-ever CI pipeline created targeting allocator/tests/unit/. act verified as working for local CI validation (act push --job unit-tests). Remaining: Phase 3 (DB-01 supabase-receptor pgTAP CI, EF-01 edge function tests) and Phase 4 (DB-02 security matrix, PL-01 Python version fix).

sessionHistory.notes: Phase 1+2 merged. Frontend CI split complete across planner, workforce, preference. match-backend CI + test restructure + skip guard implemented. vitest.config.ts uses test.projects (not removed test.workspace). act configured for local CI testing.
